refresh_trigger: AI capex, data-center power demand, backlog/order conversion, power bottleneck, rate sensitivity or valuation multiple changes materially.
drop_or_replace_if: AI capex or power-demand evidence weakens, public expressions lose leadership, or linked cases no longer stress valuation/expectation burden.
monitoring_source: company IR, IEA/EIA, FERC/grid sources, market data
notes: Keep as current hot direction only while data-center capex and power-demand evidence remain observable.

refresh_trigger: Enterprise AI agent usage, ARR, bookings, organic revenue, margin, capital allocation or valuation evidence changes materially.
drop_or_replace_if: Agent narratives no longer map to measurable company revenue, or linked case cannot test product-to-company monetization.
monitoring_source: company IR, SEC filings, product metrics, peer data
notes: Refresh if Agentforce or comparable enterprise AI product metrics are superseded.

refresh_trigger: GLP-1 volume, payer access, realized price, label, supply, competition, adherence, consumer read-through or valuation changes materially.
drop_or_replace_if: Demand narrative no longer maps to public-equity actionability, or payer/access, realized price or competition weakens the conclusion.
monitoring_source: company IR, FDA, CMS, PBM/payer sources, market data
notes: Keep direct pharma winner separate from consumer read-through until evidence supports each path.

refresh_trigger: Public-company humanoid revenue, backlog, deployments, unit economics, segment margin or customer evidence changes materially or emerges as material evidence.
drop_or_replace_if: Theme heat no longer leads market discussion, value capture remains private-only, or no public company has direct material exposure.
monitoring_source: company IR, filings, robotics platform disclosures, independent industry sources
notes: Default remains industry-map-first until material public-company value capture appears.

refresh_trigger: PPA economics, NRC/FERC status, interconnection, cost allocation, restart/SMR timing or power-demand evidence changes materially.
drop_or_replace_if: AI power demand no longer leads the market narrative, or project-specific economics/regulatory evidence weakens the selected case path.
monitoring_source: company IR, NRC, FERC, EIA/IEA, grid/operator sources
notes: Keep as industry-map-first unless project-specific economics and approvals support ticker-level actionability.

refresh_trigger: Stablecoin law/rulemaking, issuer economics, reserve yield, redemption liquidity, payment usage, take-rate or rate path changes materially.
drop_or_replace_if: Regulatory clarity, rates or usage evidence no longer supports reserve/regulatory economics as the core test.
monitoring_source: Treasury, Fed, SEC/company filings, issuer/network disclosures
notes: Refresh quickly because regulatory and rate-path assumptions can change the entire value-capture map.

refresh_trigger: DoD budget, Replicator tranche, program-of-record status, contract type, backlog, delivery, margin, export or compliance evidence changes materially.
drop_or_replace_if: Urgency no longer maps to funded programs, funding weakens, or public-company economics cannot be tied to funded programs.
monitoring_source: DoD, DIU, budget documents, company filings, contract disclosures
notes: Keep funded program and contract-quality gates ahead of ticker-level conclusion.
